note: Curated held-out TEST possessions mined by the Dueling agent. Each frame carries raw entity (x,y,vx,vy) in the env's basket-relative half-court frame plus scalar context, so the app can recompute the 73 features for what-if dragging. Q-values are the Dueling model's, in network order [shoot, pass_1..4].
